ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data pipeline monitoring and observability systems, including lineage tracking, data freshness alerting, volume anomaly detection, schema drift detection, execution monitoring, cost attribution, and root-cause analysis tooling for pipeline failures and data quality incidents.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "schemas?", "data quality"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3972); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 6 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Competency appears regularly in DE role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
